sender.description: The address of the user who initiated the deposit transaction.

n_days.description: The number of days the assets will be locked in the pool, matching the `days_to_lock` from the request. Supported for all pools except Katana. For katana, returns `lock_time`.

lock_time.description: The number of minutes the assets will be locked in the pool, matching the `lock_time` from the request. Only supported by the Katana pool. For other pools, returns `n_days`.

good_until.description: The timestamp indicating how long the deposit details, including the signature, are valid.

pool_tokens.description: The total number of pool tokens that will be given to the user as a result of the deposit.

clipper_exchange_address.description: The address of the Blade exchange contract where the deposit is being made.

deposit_amounts.description: A list of the amounts to be deposited for each asset. If an asset was not provided in the request, the amount returned will be 0. For example, if 3 assets were provided in a 4-asset pool, the response will include an amount of 0 for the missing asset. For single asset deposit this field is not present

amount.description: (Single-asset deposits only) The total amount of the single asset that is being deposited into the pool.

token.description: (Single-asset deposits only) The address of the token that is being deposited into the pool.

extra_data.description: Encode LP token price and prices list into ABI-compatible bytes. Only supported by the Katana pool.
